name: 主谓一致炼狱 · 就近与整体
desc: ☠ 炼狱单项突破：主谓一致高频陷阱——either/neither/each/every、就近一致、a number of vs the number of、分数百分数、there be 就近、集合名词、不定式动名词作主语、time/money/distance 整体单数。初三冲刺·中考拔尖。

m1.w: either / neither / each / every + 名词

m1.m: 就近一致：谓语跟最靠近的主语

m1.w: a number of + 复数名词
the number of + 复数名词
动名词 / 不定式作主语

m4.q: Either you or he ___ right; let's check the answer.
m4.why: either...or 就近一致，靠后主语 he 是单数 → is。

m4.q: Neither my parents nor my teacher ___ aware of the problem.
m4.why: neither...nor 就近一致，靠后主语 my teacher 单数 → is。

m4.q: The number of the students in our school ___ about two thousand.
m4.why: the number of（……的数量）作主语 → 单数 is。

m4.q: A number of trees ___ planted on the hill last spring.
m4.why: a number of（许多）→ 复数；last spring 过去 + 被动 → were planted。

m4.q: Each of the boys ___ a pen pal in England.
m4.why: each of + 复数名词作主语，谓语仍用单数 → has。

m4.q: Reading aloud every morning ___ us a lot with our English.
m4.why: 动名词短语作主语视为单数 → helps（一般现在习惯）。

m4.q: Every boy and girl in our class ___ to join the activity.
m4.why: every...and... 强调每一个，谓语用单数 → wants。

m4.q: The poor ___ more care and help from society.
m4.why: the + 形容词（the poor）表一类人 → 复数 need。

m4.q: Twenty kilometres ___ too long a way for the old man to walk.
m4.why: distance（距离）作主语表整体 → 单数 is。

m5.q: Not only the students but also the teacher ___ fond of the new game.
m5.why: not only...but also 就近一致，靠后主语 the teacher 单数 → is。

m5.q: Three quarters of the work ___ already been done.
m5.why: 分数 of + 不可数(work) → 单数；already + 完成 → has (been done)。

m5.q: Three quarters of the students ___ from the countryside.
m5.why: 分数 of + 可数复数(students) → 复数 are。

m5.q: The bread and butter ___ what he has for breakfast every day.
m5.why: bread and butter 是一个整体概念（黄油面包）→ 单数 is。

m5.q: There ___ a ruler and three pencils in the pencil-box.
m5.why: there be 就近一致，靠后主语 a ruler 单数 → is。

m5.q: Ten years ___ a long time to wait for a reply.
m5.why: time（一段时间）作主语、看作一个整体 → 单数 is；are/were/have been 都与“整体作单数”相悖。

m5.q: My family ___ all fond of pop music.
m5.why: family 强调成员（all fond）→ 复数 are。

m5.q: To learn a foreign language well ___ not easy at all.
m5.why: 不定式短语作主语视为单数 → is。

m5.q: Maths ___ thought to be a difficult but useful subject.
m5.why: 学科名 maths 形式为复数、意义为单数 → is。
